ThingDef.label: anjanath egg
ThingDef.description: A fertilized anjanath egg. If all goes well, it should hatch into a baby anjanath. It can be eaten raw, but it's much better cooked.

ThingDef.label: aptonoth egg
ThingDef.description: An aptonoth egg. If all goes well, it should hatch into a baby aptonoth. It can be eaten raw, but it's much better cooked.
